state.coderResponse:
The PRP has been implemented successfully. All validation gates pass.

## Summary

I created two new sibling files in the EXISTING `package provider`:

### `internal/provider/parse.go`
- Plain `package provider` line (manifest.go keeps the `// Package provider` doc — exactly one occurrence)
- Imports stdlib ONLY: `encoding/json`, `regexp`, `strings`
- Package-level `collapseNewlines = regexp.MustCompile(`​`\n{3,}`​`)` (compiled once)
- `parseOutput(raw string, m Manifest) (string, bool)` — the 5-step §12.9 pipeline byte-exactly: trim → optional single-layer fence unwrap (opener-line drop + LAST-closer cut searched in the post-opener body) → output switch (`""`/`"raw"` → msg=s; only `"json"` extracts) → `\r\n`→`\n` then 3+→2 collapse → final trim → `ok = msg != ""`
- `extractJSON(s, field string) (string, bool)` — whole-then-brace-balanced retry with strict `.(string)` assertion; any failure → `("", false)` so parseOutput falls back to raw
- Reads ONLY `m.Output`/`m.JSONField`/`m.StripCodeFence`; never returns an error; pure (no `log`/`os`/`fmt`/config)
- Godoc on both functions cites PRD §12.9 and §17.4 (Mode A docs)

### `internal/provider/parse_test.go`
- White-box `package provider`, stdlib `testing` only, `tc := tc` + `t.Run` idiom
- Full 12-case contract matrix (raw clean, fenced-raw, langtag, tilde, fenced-json, json-in-prose, malformed→fallback, non-string→fallback, newline normalization, fence-off keeps fence, empty→false, whitespace-only→false)
- `TestParseOutput_EmptyOutputIsRaw` proving `""` defaults to raw
- `TestParseOutput_PiFixture` using the realistic pi builtin manifest

### Validation gates (all green)
- ✅ `go build ./internal/provider/` clean
- ✅ `go vet ./internal/provider/` clean
- ✅ `gofmt -l internal/provider/` empty
- ✅ `go test ./internal/provider/` PASS (14 tests incl. existing manifest golden tests)
- ✅ `go test ./...` PASS (whole-module integrity)
- ✅ LSP diagnostics clean on both files

### Scope boundaries respected
Only the two new source files created; `git diff` shows no changes to manifest.go, manifest_test.go, main.go, Makefile, go.mod, go.sum, or internal/ui; no README/docs/providers TOML; no `go mod tidy`; package doc appears exactly once.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Created internal/provider/parse.go (parseOutput + extractJSON + collapseNewlines regexp implementing the PRD §12.9 pipeline byte-exactly, stdlib-only imports, pure with no error return) and internal/provider/parse_test.go (white-box table-driven tests covering the full 12-case contract matrix plus empty-Output-is-raw and a pi-fixture case). All validation gates pass: go build clean, go vet clean, gofmt empty, go test ./internal/provider/ PASS (14 tests), go test ./... PASS. Scope boundaries respected: only the two new files created; manifest.go/manifest_test.go/main.go/Makefile/go.mod/go.sum/internal/ui unchanged; package doc appears exactly once (manifest.go); no go mod tidy; no README/docs/providers TOML."
}
```
